name: investigation-corpus
description: Mixed-format corpus for the Sovereign Investigation Workbench demo. Powers the scenarios in benchmarks/scenarios/investigation-copilot.yaml. Anchors on the public-domain CMU Enron Email Dataset (a real-world, well-documented corpus of 500k+ emails released as US legal evidence in 2003) plus synthetic leak-style PDFs and audit-style XLSX files generated locally so the demo doesn't depend on any third party at run time.
license_summary: CMU Enron Email Dataset is in the public domain (released by FERC during the Enron investigation; cleaned and re-published by William Cohen at CMU). Synthetic SOPs / leak-style PDFs / audit XLSX are project-internal hackathon content (PoliSa). All sources are usable for hackathon demo without attribution constraints.

sources.title: Enron Email Dataset — Kenneth Lay /sent (CEO outbound, 266 emails)
sources.chunk_strategy: one chunk per email; From/To/Subject/Date in anchor metadata. Sent folder chosen because executive *outbound* mail is signal-dense (decisions, instructions, public-facing statements) vs inbound noise.

sources.title: Enron Email Dataset — Jeffrey Skilling /_sent_mail (CEO outbound, 275 emails)
sources.chunk_strategy: one chunk per email; outbound CEO mail dataset. _sent_mail is the Notes-format sent folder; sent/ is the Outlook-format sent folder (overlap exists, prefer _sent_mail for richer threading).

sources.title: Enron Email Dataset — James Derrick /sent_items (General Counsel outbound, 583 emails)
sources.chunk_strategy: one chunk per email. Derrick was Enron's General Counsel; his sent_items captures legal advice, disclosure analyses, and SPE consolidation discussions — the closest in-dataset analog to a Watkins-style whistleblower voice (Sherron Watkins is NOT in the CMU 150-employee subset, so we use the GC's outbound legal correspondence instead).

sources.title: Synthetic leak-style PDF memos (PoliSa-generated)
sources.chunk_strategy: one chunk per memo (typically 1-2 pages); anchor by memo title

sources.title: Synthetic Big4 audit-style spreadsheets (PoliSa-generated)
sources.chunk_strategy: one chunk per worksheet (GL, trial balance, anomalies); preserve column headers as anchor metadata
